final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a 3:4 vertical nine-grid poster designed for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book), laid out in a 3-column × 3-row grid. Each of the 9 cells must have clearly visible borders or gutters so the full image can be cleanly cut into 9 individual square cards after export. Overall aesthetic: clean, elevated, cohesive — feminine wellness / healthy lifestyle, Xiaohongshu viral cover energy.

Visual style: cream white, light beige, oat, and pale caramel as the dominant palette, accented with small amounts of dark brown text. Instagram-inspired, healing / soothing mood, sleep-therapy theme. Simple layout with light skeuomorphic illustration touches. Decorative elements may include pillows, moon, stars, warm milk, aromatherapy candle, book, sleep mask, curtains, bed linen. The overall look should resemble a polished new-media editorial graphic — neat typography, knowledge-sharing infographic style.

Layout rules:
- The full image is a standard nine-grid composition; each cell is self-contained and centered.
- No title or body text placed near a grid dividing line.
- Visible gutters or thin borders between every cell to ensure clean cropping.
- All text is in Chinese, legible, no garbled characters, no English body text.
- Each cell reads as an independent Xiaohongshu image-text card while sharing a unified visual language.
- Refined, natural, editorial feel — no cheap marketing look, no excessive decoration.

Cell contents (all text verbatim, all Chinese):

【第1格 — 封面】
大标题：让你倒头就睡的8个 tips
副标题：失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏
Visual: soft bed, moon, pillow, sleep mask; title is the most prominent element; layout feels premium and eye-catching.

【第2格】
标题：1. 睡前1小时别玩手机
正文：蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。
Illustration elements: phone, moon, sleepy-face doodle.

【第3格】
标题：2. 睡前把灯光调暗
正文：暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。
Illustration elements: bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains.

【第4格】
标题：3. 房间温度别太高
正文：稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。
Illustration elements: air conditioner, thermometer, blanket.

【第5格】
标题：4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡
正文：咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。
Illustration elements: coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol.

【第6格】
标题：5. 睡前洗个热水澡
正文：能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。
Illustration elements: bathroom steam, towel, hot water.

【第7格】
标题：6. 脑子停不下来就写下来
正文：把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。
Illustration elements: notebook, pen, small desk lamp.

【第8格】
标题：7. 固定上床时间
正文：每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。
Illustration elements: clock, moon, bed.

【第9格】
标题：8. 试试深呼吸放松法
正文：吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。
底部小字：收藏这组，今晚试试看
Illustration elements: breath-wave lines, closed-eyes figure, stars.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu nine-grid infographic poster, light skeuomorphic illustration, editorial new-media design
Composition: strict 3×3 grid with visible gutters, each cell centered and self-contained, 3:4 vertical full canvas
Subject: sleep tips knowledge-sharing nine-grid card set, 8 tips total across 9 cells
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: healing, soothing, warm and soft
Color palette: cream white, light beige, oat, pale caramel, dark brown text accents
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 让你倒头就睡的8个 tips／失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏／1. 睡前1小时别玩手机／蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。／2. 睡前把灯光调暗／暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。／3. 房间温度别太高／稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。／4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡／咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。／5. 睡前洗个热水澡／能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。／6. 脑子停不下来就写下来／把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。／7. 固定上床时间／每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。／8. 试试深呼吸放松法／吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。／收藏这组，今晚试试看
Constraints: all body text in Chinese; no English text in cells; grid lines/gutters must be clearly visible for post-export cutting; no text placed on or near grid dividing lines
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, excessive decoration, garbled or missing Chinese characters, text overlapping grid borders
